theme_info.rationale: To position NAQAL GO as a premium, secure, and professional logistics service, moving away from generic bright-colored delivery apps. The dark theme with gold/amber accents evokes high-end transportation (akin to Uber Black), building trust for transporting valuable furniture and goods.

font_family.primary_arabic: Tajawal, Cairo, or IBM Plex Sans Arabic

rules.headings: Use bold weights for headings to ensure legibility in Arabic. Ensure line heights accommodate Arabic diacritics.
rules.numbers: Use standard Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3) for pricing and distances for clarity, formatted with IQD (e.g., 12,000 د.ع).

rtl_rules.flex_direction: Use 'row-reverse' for Arabic, or rely on I18nManager.forceRTL(true) which automatically flips 'row'.
rtl_rules.text_align: Right-aligned by default in Arabic. Left-aligned for numbers/English text if necessary.

map.style: Dark mode map style required. Roads should be dark grey/brown, background almost black, route lines in Gold (#D4A437). Use custom JSON array for React Native Maps provider='google'.

login.layout: Hero image/logo at top, Phone input and OTP below. Heavy use of the dark brown/gold aesthetic. Feel: Secure and exclusive.

home.layout: Welcome header with user name and profile pic. 2x2 Grid of Service Cards (Furniture, Goods, Appliances, Special). Recent orders horizontal list below.

map_selection.layout: Full screen map. Floating search bar for Pickup/Dropoff (RTL aligned). Bottom sheet for Vehicle Selection (Kia, Pickup, Medium, Large) with real-time price estimation.

order_tracking.layout: Map focusing on driver location. Bottom sheet showing Driver Info (photo, rating, truck plate), Call/Chat buttons, and ETA.

onboarding_truck.description: Cinematic dark/gold truck for onboarding/hero backgrounds.

premium_dark_bg.description: Abstract elegant background for login or profile screens.

stock_truck.description: Real life truck reference for vehicle selection.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure I18nManager from 'react-native' is configured for RTL properly. All Layouts should respect RTL (Right to Left) flow.
Use Phosphor Icons or similar icon library, and flip directional icons (like chevrons/arrows) horizontally for RTL.
For the Map, use react-native-maps with a custom mapStyle JSON to make it dark mode, utilizing #0D0907 for land and #1A120C for roads, with #D4A437 for the route polyline.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, list items) to support automated testing.
Component files should be `.js` (not `.tsx`). Utilize React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind if configured, adhering strictly to the dark brown/gold color palette.
Avoid generic 'card' looks. Use subtle 1px borders (#3D2817) and heavy shadows to create depth on the dark background.
Currency formatting: Always format prices as 'X,XXX د.ع' (Iraqi Dinar).
Images MUST NOT be placeholders. Use the provided media_urls for UI implementation.
